name: frontend-learning-demos
description: 前端语法与框架复习 Demo 库，每个 HTML 可直接打开。

scripts.build:index: node scripts/build-index.mjs && node scripts/inject-demo-nav.mjs && node scripts/gen-vitepress-sidebar.mjs && node scripts/sync-docs-index.mjs && node scripts/gen-demo-search-index.mjs
scripts.check:index: node scripts/build-index.mjs --check && node scripts/gen-vitepress-sidebar.mjs --check && node scripts/sync-docs-index.mjs --check && node scripts/gen-demo-search-index.mjs --check
scripts.docs:build: node scripts/gen-vitepress-sidebar.mjs && vitepress build docs && node scripts/copy-docs-assets.mjs
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-demos.mjs && node scripts/sync-readmes.mjs --check && node scripts/validate-typescript-coverage.mjs && node scripts/validate-topic-coverage.mjs && node scripts/validate-browser-smoke.mjs && npm run validate:tsc && npm run validate:libs
